caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned in front of a television and a soundbar. The man on the left has graying hair and wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right has reddish-brown hair and a beard, wearing a gray t-shirt and a necklace. Above them, yellow text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS," though a portion is obscured in the final frame. A smaller video screen is superimposed over the center of the image, showing scenes from a historical drama. Initially, the inset video shows a high-angle shot of people in a stone courtyard, and the caption "It is your duty to protect every part of your empire" appears. This transition continues into a wider shot of a large crowd gathered in a courtyard with arched architecture, followed by a close-up of a woman in traditional attire. Throughout the sequence, the two men maintain neutral or skeptical facial expressions.
